expectations.text: The controller sets Content-Type, Cache-Control, and X-Accel-Buffering headers
expectations.evidence: Found setting headers on lines 80, 84, and 85 of sse_stream, and lines 29, 30 of client_stream.

expectations.text: One action implements the with_stream pattern using response.headers['rack.hijack'] and proc
expectations.evidence: Found with_stream helper assigning to response.headers['rack.hijack'] a proc with Thread.new loop on lines 182-195.

expectations.text: One action includes ActionController::Live and writes to response.stream
expectations.evidence: Found include ActionController::Live on line 14 and writing to response.stream on line 90.

expectations.text: Both endpoints handle IOError for client disconnect
expectations.evidence: Found rescue IOError in both client_stream and sse_stream.

expectations.text: Both endpoints close the stream in ensure blocks
expectations.evidence: Found stream.close in client_stream ensures and response.stream.close in sse_stream ensure.

expectations.text: The controller uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events before writing to the streams
expectations.evidence: The controller does not require or use AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder; it writes raw text directly to the socket/stream.

expectations.text: The endpoints stream specific AG-UI events such as RunStartedEvent and RunFinishedEvent
expectations.evidence: The actions stream raw strings like 'Data chunk X' and 'Event message X' instead of AgUiProtocol events.
